title: Cucumber variety ladder — OPV vs hybrid yield gap
body: HORDI's released cucumber portfolio includes six named varieties: HORDI Green, HORDI White, Kalpitiya White, Champion, Gannoruwa White, and LY 58. The practical rule is that OPV types yield 15–20 t/ha while hybrid types reach 25–30 t/ha — a 50–100% premium for the hybrid seed cost. All plant at 1 × 1 m monoculture with a 1 kg/ha seed rate, and all share the same basal fertilizer (75 Urea + 200 TSP + 60 MOP kg/ha). Cucumber grows up to 1000 m elevation on multiple soil types with pH 5.5–7.5 — it's one of the most forgiving cucurbits for beginner farmers. Main watch-outs: cucumber mosaic virus (vectored by aphids) and powdery mildew on shaded leaves; both controlled per DOA 2019 recommendations.

body_translated.en: HORDI's released cucumber portfolio includes six named varieties: HORDI Green, HORDI White, Kalpitiya White, Champion, Gannoruwa White, and LY 58. The practical rule is that OPV types yield 15–20 t/ha while hybrid types reach 25–30 t/ha — a 50–100% premium for the hybrid seed cost. All plant at 1 × 1 m monoculture with a 1 kg/ha seed rate, and all share the same basal fertilizer (75 Urea + 200 TSP + 60 MOP kg/ha). Cucumber grows up to 1000 m elevation on multiple soil types with pH 5.5–7.5 — it's one of the most forgiving cucurbits for beginner farmers. Main watch-outs: cucumber mosaic virus (vectored by aphids) and powdery mildew on shaded leaves; both controlled per DOA 2019 recommendations.
body_translated.si: HORDI නිකුත් කළ කැකිරි (පිපිඤ්ඤා) ප්‍රභේද හයක් ඇත: HORDI Green, HORDI White, Kalpitiya White, Champion, Gannoruwa White, සහ LY 58. ප්‍රායෝගික රීතිය වන්නේ OPV වර්ග 15–20 t/ha ද, හයිබ්‍රිඩ් වර්ග 25–30 t/ha ද ලබා දෙන බවයි — හයිබ්‍රිඩ් බීජ පිරිවැයට 50–100% ක අමතර අස්වැන්නකි. සියල්ලම 1 × 1 m ඒක වගාවෙන් 1 kg/ha බීජ අනුපාතයෙන් වගා කළ යුතු අතර, එකම මූලික පොහොර යෙදුම (75 Urea + 200 TSP + 60 MOP kg/ha) බෙදා ගනී. කැකිරි 1000 m උසකට දක්වා, pH 5.5–7.5 පස වර්ග රාශියකට වැඩේ — නවක ගොවීන්ට වඩාත්ම ඉවසන කකුම්බිත බෝගයකි. ප්‍රධාන සැළකිල්ල: කැකිරි මොසෙයික් වෛරසය (මැස්සන් මඟින් ව්‍යාප්ත වේ) සහ සෙවනැති පත්‍රවල පවුඩරි මිල්ඩියු; දෙකම DOA 2019 නිර්දේශ අනුව පාලනය කළ හැකිය.
body_translated.ta: HORDI வெளியிட்ட வெள்ளரிக்காய் தொகுப்பில் ஆறு வகைகள் உள்ளன: HORDI Green, HORDI White, Kalpitiya White, Champion, Gannoruwa White, மற்றும் LY 58. நடைமுறை விதி என்னவென்றால் OPV வகைகள் 15–20 t/ha-ம் ஹைப்ரிட் வகைகள் 25–30 t/ha-ம் தருகின்றன — ஹைப்ரிட் விதை செலவுக்கு 50–100% கூடுதல் மகசூல். அனைத்தும் 1 × 1 m ஒற்றைப்பயிராக, 1 kg/ha விதை விகிதத்தில் நடவு செய்யப்படுகின்றன, மற்றும் ஒரே அடிப்படை உரம் (75 Urea + 200 TSP + 60 MOP kg/ha) பகிர்கின்றன. வெள்ளரிக்காய் 1000 m உயரம் வரை, pH 5.5–7.5 பல மண் வகைகளில் வளரும் — ஆரம்ப விவசாயிகளுக்கு மிகவும் மன்னிக்கும் cucurbit வகை. முக்கிய கவனிப்புகள்: வெள்ளரி மொசைக் வைரஸ் (அஃபிட்களால் பரவுகிறது) மற்றும் நிழலிடப்பட்ட இலைகளில் பவுடரி மில்டியூ; இரண்டும் DOA 2019 பரிந்துரைகளின்படி கட்டுப்படுத்தப்படுகின்றன.

quote: Released Varieties: HORDI Green, HORDI White, Kalpitiya White, Champion, Gannoruwa White, LY 58. Yield: 15-20 t/ha OP varieties; 25-30 t/ha Hybrid varieties. Spacing: 1m x 1m as a spacing for mono culture. Seed Rate: 1 kg/ha. Can be cultivated up to above 1000 m sea level.
